execution_plan.objective: Take Thimble from v0.0 hobby to a small-team-trustable secrets manager: source shape, vocabulary, legal/trust scaffolding, code restructure, CI gates, runtime hardening, web UI hardening, recipient governance, release & install hardening, DevX polish.

waves.name: Wave 1: Foundation Alignment
waves.objective: Source-shape and vocabulary baseline before any other work begins

waves.name: Wave 2: Legal & Trust Scaffolding
waves.objective: Repo passes basic procurement smell-test; trust enablers in place

waves.name: Wave 3: Code Structure
waves.objective: main.go split into auditable packages with clear trust boundaries

waves.name: Wave 4: CI / Quality Gates
waves.objective: PRs run vet, test, lint, vuln, and real-age integration

waves.name: Wave 5: Runtime Security Hardening
waves.objective: Close the runtime threat-model items: age trust, identity hygiene, locks, audit, ops

waves.name: Wave 6: Web UI Hardening
waves.objective: Close web-surface items: cookies, host allowlist, cache, rotation, plaintext policy, scope

waves.name: Wave 7: Recipient Governance
waves.objective: Recipient adds gated by quorum; rotate flow on removal
